name: Aldous Kern

special_abilities.name: Missing Memory
special_abilities.desc: Aldous cannot perceive or remember his brother Willem, who was erased by the False Hydra. Information about Willem does not stick. This is a roleplay note, not a mechanic — he makes no save against this condition because he cannot notice it.

actions.name: Walking Staff
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.

description: A thin pilgrim in his mid-forties, traveling alone. He has the look of someone who has been walking for a long time. He is not a combatant — his value is as a warning the party does not yet have context to understand. He is a False Hydra future victim, already forgetting the brother who is gone.
